overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit downtown district. The player character waits at a crosswalk, crosses a busy street with futuristic vehicles, walks past street vendors and holographic advertisements, and approaches a plaza with stairs. The wet streets reflect the vibrant blue, purple, and yellow neon lights characteristic of the cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with zebra crossing and neon-lit skyline

events.description: begins walking forward from the sidewalk onto the yellow crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to pass, then stepping onto the yellow-striped crossing

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes reflecting neon lights
tall modern building with blue and white neon accent lighting on facade
large floating advertisement displaying animated content above the street
small vendor structure with illuminated menu visible across the street

segments.scene_description: Standing at a rain-slicked street corner in a cyberpunk downtown district, waiting to cross. The yellow zebra crossing stretches across the wet asphalt reflecting the neon glow from surrounding skyscrapers and holographic billboards. Traffic flows through the intersection as the player prepares to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with moderate traffic

events.description: purple retro-futuristic muscle car passes closely from left to right in front of the player
black van and red sports car drive through the crosswalk from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide intersection while futuristic vehicles pass in front and behind

notable_agents.action: purple vintage-style futuristic car with glowing wheels driving across the crosswalk
red sports car accelerating through the intersection after waiting

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk through moderate traffic in the neon-lit downtown. Various futuristic vehicles including a distinctive purple muscle car and a red sports car drive past as the player moves toward the opposite sidewalk. The street food stall approaches on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with food vendors and pedestrians

events.description: steps off the crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk, passing red and white construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the food stall and other pedestrians, moving deeper into the downtown area

notable_agents.action: person in shorts and tank top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark wall with large white Japanese characters and red accent lighting
red and white striped plastic barriers lining the sidewalk edge
tall palm trees lining the street with uplighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk past a street food stall with construction barriers. The building wall on the left features large illuminated Japanese characters. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and palm trees line the path ahead. The environment transitions from the open street to a more enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stairs leading to upper level

events.description: sidewalk opens into a wider plaza area with visible stairs leading upward

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the plaza toward the stairs, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking up the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide concrete stairway leading up to an elevated pedestrian area
large concrete overpass structure with vehicles visible on the upper level
multi-story residential building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a spacious plaza with wet paved tiles reflecting the surrounding neon lights. A wide concrete stairway leads upward toward an elevated highway overpass. Modern apartment buildings rise on the left while the player approaches the stairs following other pedestrians through the open urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked street corner through a dense neon-lit district and into an open urban plaza. It begins at a yellow zebra crossing where the wet asphalt reflects the glow of towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards as traffic flows through the intersection. As the camera moves across the wide crosswalk, futuristic purple and red vehicles glide past before the perspective shifts toward the opposite sidewalk. The scene then narrows into an enclosed urban corridor, passing a street food stall and illuminated Japanese characters on a building wall while weaving through pedestrians and palm trees. Finally, the path expands into a spacious plaza of reflective paved tiles, leading the camera toward a wide concrete stairway that ascends toward an elevated highway overpass.
